chunks.text: 1 Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1524 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 7391/2021 3.For hearing of main case 26-10-2022 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, advocate for the Respondent No.6. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner, namely, Sukkur Motors Works Association is a society registered under the Societies Registration Act, 1860 vide registration No.1342 of 1995 and this petition has been filed by the said Association through its General Secretary seeking directions to the respondent No.1 to decide the application filed against order dated 11.10.2021, whereby respondent No.5 cancelled/withdrawn the confirmation of intimation dated 04.09.2020, whereby names of office bearers of the Managing Committee for the year 2020 were notified. It is an admitted position that tenure of two years of the Managing Committee of the petitioner Association has already completed; hence learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of instant petition by directing to the Provincial Registrar Joint Stock Companies, Sukkur Region Sukkur (respondent No.4) to conduct the election of the association under supervision of the Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur (respondent No.2) by forming the Election Committee, as per byelaws and as per schedule dated 08.03.2022 for the election of Managing Committee of the Association for the period of 2022-2024. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application.
Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
